mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, phone, role, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM users WHERE role = 'REPAIR' AND status = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
